sizing_rule.note: Allocate position size inversely to portfolio impact. When position impact exceeds 40% of portfolio (calculated as volatility × contract notional ÷ total equity), reduce position size by impact_reduction_factor of 0.8. Rebalance every 20 days.

source_rule_text: A trader should allocate position size inversely to the portfolio impact of that instrument, sizing smaller in high-impact assets and larger in low-impact assets, based on the percentage of portfolio return driven by each position.
